calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-293 waking ghost-goal probe substrate validation (5 sub-tests)
items.note: Diagnostic validation of MECH-293 waking ghost-goal probe search landed 2026-04-27. Pure routing logic; no trainable parameters; no phased training. Five sub-tests UC1-UC5: UC1 module / config / method / Trajectory-field exposure (HippocampalConfig.use_mech293_ghost_probes + 4 sub-knobs; HippocampalModule._propose_ghost_seeded + _mix_value_flat_with_ghost + get_last_propose_diagnostics; Trajectory.hypothesis_tag default False + .metadata default None). UC2 master OFF bit-identical (no trajectory carries the ghost source tag; get_last_propose_diagnostics returns {}; all hypothesis_tag=False / metadata=None). UC3 ghost_branch_fires (MECH-293 ON + populated MECH-292 bank -> >=1 trajectory tagged metadata['source']=='mech293_ghost_probe' with hypothesis_tag=True; diagnostics report n_ghost_admitted >= 1 + reason='ok' + max_ghost_priority > 0 + mean_goal_match_at_seed > 0). UC4 hypothesis_tag_preserved (every ghost trajectory carries hypothesis_tag=True + metadata.anchor_key + ghost_priority + goal_match; non-ghost candidates remain default-clean -- provenance is provenance, not noise). UC5 budget_respected across three arms: ARM A (large bank, fraction=0.25, n=8 -> n_ghost==2 with len(candidates) preserved at 8); ARM B (bank size=1 -> n_ghost==1 cap honoured); ARM C (fraction=0 + min_floor=1 -> n_ghost==1 floor wins). Mac smoke 2026-04-27: 5/5 PASS (34s). Behavioural validation = V3-EXQ-495 V3 full-completion gate (MECH-163 dual systems test); not queued in this session.

items.title: MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate -- VTA / hippocampally-planned arm
items.note: V3 FULL-COMPLETION GATE for MECH-163 dual goal-directed systems. THE discriminative test for the VTA / hippocampally-planned arm of MECH-163. Substrate prerequisites all landed 2026-04-27: SD-039 anchor goal-snapshot payload (V3-EXQ-494 6/6 PASS), MECH-292 ranked ghost-goal bank (V3-EXQ-496 5/5 PASS), MECH-293 waking ghost-goal probe search (V3-EXQ-497 5/5 PASS). EXQ-327 was reclassified to ['SD-015'] only on 2026-04-27 (R1 governance fix); the dual-system distinction itself remained untested until this run. Design: 3 conditions (HABIT value-flat proposals; PLANNED ghost-seeded proposals via MECH-293; ABLATED no goal anywhere) x 2 paradigms (A_DETOUR mid-episode blockage at T_block=60% on the cached short corridor; B_NOVEL_CONTEXT cross-episode env swap from train seed to seed=137) x 7 seeds. P0 100 ep encoder warmup + P1 100 ep full pipeline + P2 50 ep evaluation, 200 steps/ep. Acceptance C1-C5: C1 PLANNED.ghost_branch_fires (mech293_n_ghost_admitted > 0 in both paradigms); **C2 PLANNED.benefit_post_block - HABIT.benefit_post_block >= 0.30 in detour, >= 4/7 seeds -- THE V3 full-completion criterion**; C3 HABIT >= ABLATED in standard episodes (within-experiment regression); C4 PLANNED.prox_r2 >= 0.7 (encoder unbroken); C5 PLANNED.harm within 10% of HABIT (no harm regression). KL_PLANNED_HABIT first-step-action-distribution divergence recorded as diagnostic. FISHTANK VIZ: per-step recording during P2 eval on FISHTANK_RECORD_SEED=42 only, FISHTANK_EPISODES_PER_CELL=3 first episodes per (condition, paradigm) cell -- 6 cells total -- writes sibling *_episode_log.json that fishtank_viz.html /api/fishtank/logs auto-discovers. Per-step record carries ghost_admitted (MECH-293 tick firing) and is_blocked_step (paradigm-A detour injection moment) so the viewer surfaces the PLANNED-vs-HABIT routing contrast directly. RUNTIME ESTIMATE: 42 cells x 250 episodes x 200 steps. Mac calibrated at ~0.10 min/ep -> ~17h single-machine; ree-cloud-1 calibrated at ~0.23 min/ep -> ~40h. machine_affinity=any to let the first idle worker claim it; estimated_minutes=1500 (~25h) as defensive midpoint -- runner auto-calibrates from actual elapsed. Diagnostics, fishtank log, and acceptance evaluation all run synchronously inside main() at end-of-run. Successor experiment if FAIL: see KL_PLANNED_HABIT diagnostic (KL ~ 0 + C2 fail = paradigm not requiring multi-step planning; KL > 0 + C2 fail = candidates differ but E3 scoring washes them out).
